content:
# Uthmaniyah Area

**Summary**: Geographic study area or location in the thesis collection.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2002-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2002]] conducted research at Uthmaniyah Area

- [[1992-rodriguez|Rodriguez, 1992]] used carbonate rocks from the Uthmaniyah area for study.

- [[2011-al-dossary|Al-Dossary, 2011]] studied the Uthmanyia area to address well integrity issues.

- [[2015-mohammed-2|Mohammed, 2015]] studied crude oil from the Uthmaniyah Arab-D field.

- [[2015-fogang|FOGANG, 2015]] used crude oil from the Uthmaniya field to test as an internal breaker.

- [[1992-rodriguez-2|Rodriguez, 1992]] used carbonate rocks from the Uthmaniyah area for testing.

- [[1994-eme|Eme, 1994]] used crude oil from the Uthmaniyah area to model a limestone reservoir.

## Geological and Structural Setting



- [[1992-rodriguez|Rodriguez, 1992]] used carbonate rocks from the Uthmaniyah area for study.

- [[2011-al-dossary|Al-Dossary, 2011]] studied the Uthmanyia area to address well integrity issues.

- [[2015-mohammed-2|Mohammed, 2015]] studied crude oil from the Uthmaniyah Arab-D field.

- [[2015-fogang|FOGANG, 2015]] used crude oil from the Uthmaniya field to test as an internal breaker.

- [[1992-rodriguez-2|Rodriguez, 1992]] used carbonate rocks from the Uthmaniyah area for testing.

- [[1994-eme|Eme, 1994]] used crude oil from the Uthmaniyah area to model a limestone reservoir.

## Formations Present



## Key Findings From This Location

- conducted research at Uthmaniyah Area ([[2002-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2002]])

- Not stated in source ([[1992-rodriguez|Rodriguez, 1992]])

- The Uthmanyia field experienced significant problems with communication between Arab-C and D formations. ([[2011-al-dossary|Al-Dossary, 2011, p. 13]])

- The study used dead crude oil with an API of 30.77 from this area. ([[2015-mohammed-2|Mohammed, 2015, p. 59]])

- Crude oil from the Uthmaniya field had a specific gravity of 0.897. ([[2015-fogang|FOGANG, 2015, p. 38]])

- Not stated in source ([[1992-rodriguez-2|Rodriguez, 1992]])

- The study targeted a carbonate reservoir with high temperature and salinity conditions typical of this region. ([[1994-eme|Eme, 1994, p. 24]])
